hoshi_section.title: Delivery Pipeline

stages.english: Process Order | Delivery | Return to Plant

cards.name: O1A.1 Prepare and Ship Product from Sales Order
features: O1A.1.1 Instant Pick List, Delivery Receipt, mobile-access
O1A.1.2 summary table and individual order formats
O1A.1.3 Multiple details like location, date timestamps, product S/N
data_outputs: O1A.1.6 Docs from system: Pick List, Delivery Receipt, Charge Invoice (softcopy and pdf formats)
O1A.1.7 Written docs: Gate pass
O1A.1.8 equivalent system data crawl in Inventory and Accounting modules

cards.name: O1A.2 Deliver Order, Return Lorry Tank, Signed Charge Invoice, Client Inventory Report
cards.trigger: Printed DR, Charge Invoice with specified delivery date and team.
data_outputs: O1A.2.4 signed Delivery Receipt and Charge Invoice
O1A.2.5 other docs

cards.name: O1A.3 Return to Plant, signed Charge Invoice, monitor sheet
cards.trigger: Client signs Charge Invoice and Delivery Receipt
features: O1A.3.1 Driver returns to plant with signed Charge Invoice and Delivery Receipt
O1A.3.2 Acctg staff confirms Invoice entry, upon receiving signed Charge Invoice and Delivery Receipt Confirm from Delivery Driver
O1A.3.3 Review correct collection date and chart of account
data_outputs: O1A.3.4 Data
O1A.3.5 Open intake queue

cards.name: O4A.1
cards.trigger: Sets quantity for floor stocks for key periods
data_outputs: O4A.1.4 Release history
O4A.1.5 Launch approval log

stages.english: Reports | Monitoring | Compliance | Variance Sanctions and Adjustments

cards.name: O5A.1 Inventory Monitoring Report
cards.trigger: Daily data input of warehouse and floor stock location (from/to), customer, transaction (in and out), scheduled/actual timestamps, vehicle, driver, helper

approval.label: Input Storage Tanks Opening and Closing Readings
Input Sold Cylinders for the Day

data_outputs: O5A.1.4 Inventory per location/per transaction/per period reports
O5A.1.5 Inv Variances and Adjustment Monthly Summary

cards.name: O5A.2 Inventory Planning and Forecast
cards.trigger: Daily data input of inventory + Sales Target Budget per week per sales avenue

approval.label: Set Budget and Review forecast data

data_outputs: O5A.2.4 Weekly/Monthly Inventory Forecast Report
O5A.2.5 auto-draft Purchased Orders

cards.name: O5A.3 Variance Monitoring and Resolving
data_outputs: O5A.3.4 Inv Variance per Location/per period Summary
O5A.3.5 Inv Adjustment per location/per period Summary

cards.name: O5A.4 Cylinder Qty, State and Variance Monitoring
cards.trigger: Daily data input of warehouse and floor stock location (from/to), S/N, Size, Qty, Tare Weight, and Painting State, Customers/Locations
features: O5A.4.1 Daily/Weekly/Monthly instant, consolidated data per user
O5A.4.2 Versatile multi-view, multi-period summaries for updating groups/ for reviewing qty
O5A.4.3 Versatile Cylinder Qty and State Reports

approval.label: Count qty,size and state of cylinders, Grind and Label
Encode qty,size and state of cylinders
Review extent of cylinder state, qty and variances

data_outputs: O5A.4.5 Cylinder Inventory and State Report
O5A.4.6 Cylinder Variance per Location/per period Summary
O5A.4.7 Cylinder Adjustment per location/per period Summary

cards.name: O5A.5 xx
data_outputs: O5A.5.4 Inv Variance per Location/per period Summary
O5A.5.5 Inv Adjustment per location/per period Summary

cross_stage.name: Overall
features: Track blockers across the full workflow
data_outputs: Cross-stage status report
Escalation dashboard

pain_points: Process Order: C1.1.1 Client orders 22kg and 50kg cylinder variants.
Fulfil Order: C1.2.1 Using Sales Order, Delivery Head schedules delivery [vehicle, capacity, route].
C1.1.2 Warehouse generates Picklist and picks LPG/products.
C1.1.3 Warehouse generates Delivery Receipt (2 DRs and 2 CRs).
C1.1.4.1 Warehouse submits DR to Acctg to make General Ledger and Inventory.
C1.1.4.2 Driver gets Delivery Receipt (DR) from Warehouse for multiple clients.
Driver and Pahinante drive to client locations.
C1.1.4.3 No Delivery/For Pick up. Warehouse gives DR to customer for signature.
C1.1.5.1 On client site, Pahinante weighs and records the cylinders, then delivers them.
C1.1.5.2 Client signs DR and picks up items and returns empty cylinder.
C1.1.5.3 Check threshold 1-3kg, above and below, roundup/down, classification.
C1.1.6 Provide Credit Notes to client with cylinder serial number and weight residue.
C1.1.7 Driver returns to Plant and weighs empty cylinders.
C1.1.8 Driver submits record and signed DR and AR to Acctg.
C1.1.9 Acctg Staff reconciles General Ledger with signed DR and AR.
Compute Commercial Gains: Gather weight in and weigh out records at Client and Plant.
Record in Gsheet and ACPAC.
Compute Commission and Distribute.
C2.1 Process Order: Industrial clients orders selected cylinder tanks.
C2.2 Fulfil Order: Check Industrial gains and order fulfillment procedures.
C2.3 Compute Gains: Commission calculations and distribution.
C3.1 Process Order: Client orders 2.5kg and 11kg cylinder variants.
C3.1.2 Sales Rep creates a Sales Order form with delivery/pickup date.
C3.1.2.1 IF PICKUP and with TERMS: Client comes to pickup and signs the Sales Order Form.
C3.1.2.2 IF PICKUP and PAYMENT: Client comes to pickup and pays.
C3.1.2.3 IF DELIVERY and with TERMS: Driver checks schedule and delivers with DR.
C3.1.2.3.1 Driver gets empty cylinder, weighs and records with customer signature.
C3.2 Fulfil Order: Order fulfillment procedures and delivery logistics.
C3.3 Compute Operational Gains: Commission calculations and tracking.
ALERT: Cylinder brand switching considerations.
C4.1 Process Order: Client order processing and validation.
C4.2 Fulfil Order: Order fulfillment procedures and delivery.
C4.3 Compute Gains: Commission calculations and reconciliation.
Same as above Dealer steps
C5.1.1 Purchaser forwards PO to Refinery Supplier and schedules delivery.
Plant Manager receives the Purchased Lorry Trucks and gets the DR and Invoice from delivery team.
C5.1.2 Plant Manager fills Receiving Report (RR) and unloads contents to Storage Tank.
C5.1.3 Plant Staff measures content volume using gauge and documents.
C5.1.3.1 Changes in the qty are reported after the Receiving Report.
C5.1.4 Stock Transfer: Gas content is refilled from Storage Tank to cylinders following FIFO process.
C5.1.5 Use Google apps for refilling cylinders.
2 Storage Locations: Tank 1 and Tank 2.
2 Types of Residue: Regular and WIWO affecting inventory and billing.
Schedule and follow Pull-out Calendar and Pull-out Dates at client sites.
C5.3.1 Cylinders purchased annually with individual serial numbers.
C5.3.2 Cylinders have lifespan requiring Repaint and testing with batch number.
